build.buildCommand: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile --prod=false && echo '=== @tailwindcss dir ===' && ls -la /app/node_modules/@tailwindcss/ && echo '=== oxide loader head ===' && head -120 /app/node_modules/@tailwindcss/oxide/index.js && pnpm prisma generate && pnpm build

deploy.startCommand: pnpm prisma migrate deploy && pnpm start
